name: possibility-area-cliente
description: Possibility® — Área Cliente (clients) + pipe (admin) — energy invoice management

scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:stack:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:stack:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:admin
